2603.26099.title: "Oops! ChatGPT is Temporarily Unavailable!": A Diary Study on Knowledge Workers' Experiences of LLM Withdrawal
2603.26099.paper_summary: LLMs have become deeply embedded in knowledge work, raising concerns about growing dependency and the potential undermining of human skills. To investigate the pervasiveness of LLMs in work practices, we conducted a four-day diary study with frequent LLM users (N=10), observing how knowledge workers responded to a temporary withdrawal of LLMs. Our findings show how LLM withdrawal disrupted participants' workflows by identifying gaps in task execution, how self-directed work led participants to reclaim professional values, and how everyday practices revealed the extent to which LLM use had become inescapably normative. Conceptualizing LLMs as infrastructural to contemporary knowledge work, this research contributes empirical insights into the often invisible role of LLMs and proposes value-driven appropriation as an approach to supporting professional values in the current LLM-pervasive work environment.
2603.26099.paper_summary_zh: LLMs 已經深深融入知識工作中，這引發了對日益依賴和潛在削弱人類技能的擔憂。<lb/>為了調查 LLMs 在工作實踐中的普遍性，我們對 10 位經常使用 LLM 的用戶進行了為期四天的日記研究，觀察知識工作者在 LLM 暫時撤回時的反應。<lb/>我們的研究結果顯示，LLM 的撤回如何干擾了參與者的工作流程，通過識別任務執行中的空白，<lb/>自我導向的工作如何使參與者重新獲得專業價值，以及日常實踐如何揭示 LLM 使用已成為不可避免的規範的程度。<lb/>將 LLM 概念化為當代知識工作的重要基礎設施，本研究為 LLM 的常常隱形角色提供了實證見解，並提出以價值為驅動的適應作為在當前 LLM 普及工作環境中支持專業價值的一種方法。
2603.26099.author: Eunseo Oh et.al.
2603.26099.authors: Eunseo Oh, Suyoun Lee, Jae Young Choi, Soobin Park, Youn-kyung Lim
